title: Keluda's speeder bike
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Republic_47_19_Keluda_bike.jpg|thumb|250px|[[Keluda]] on his speeder bike on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].]]
This '''[[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle in operation during the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Keluda]] notably owned one of these [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeder]] bikes.

This model featured a large windscreen protecting the bike's thin frame, and two headlights mounted on the front. The controls consisted of handlebars, and Keluda's bike appeared to have been modified with an additional pair of handlebars to suit his Dug physiology.

Keluda piloted this speeder bike during the attempted assassination of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], following the death of [[Jheramahd Greyshade]]. Keluda fired upon Simon's [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] from the seat of his speeder bike, though the Senator's [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] protectors, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], managed to evade the Dug's shots. A chase ensued, progressing around the cars of a [[hauler tram]]. Kenobi leaped from his speeder and onto the tram just as Keluda rounded the hauler, and sliced his speeder bike in two with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. The pieces fell towards the lower levels of [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]], and Keluda himself was killed moments later by a reflected shot from Kenobi's blade.
